summary: Added a production server-agent operating runbook covering API gates, service-manager env, systemd shape, pid-file protection, heartbeat, cwd boundary, restart, and token rotation.
remaining_risks: The systemd unit is a handoff template, not an installed service on this machine.
Production team/server ids, release paths, and secret-manager values remain environment-owned inputs.
Failure/rehearsal trace governance is deferred to S015.
next: S015 can start: govern failed records and rehearsal traces without deleting audit history.
